title: [RESOLVED] Severity enum omits `critical` vs authoritative reviewer prompt
description: Iter-1 finding 1. Line 59 now reads `[severity: critical|major|minor|nit]`, matching the authoritative `.opencode/agent/reviewer.md` line 397 (`critical | major | minor | nit`). The 4-value set is exact; the no-space pipe formatting is cosmetic and consistent with the rest of the spec's inline-enum style. AC-F4-2 / RSK-1 (authoritative accuracy) restored.

title: [RESOLVED] Plan tasks for Phases 3–7 unchecked though delivered (DONE_BUT_UNCHECKED) + DoD over-claim
description: Iter-1 finding 2. All 25 Phase 3–7 task checkboxes (3.1–3.4, 4.1–4.6, 5.1–5.6, 6.1–6.4, 7.1–7.5) are now `- [x]`, matching the Execution Log's ✅ state for those phases. Phase 8.4 DoD claim 'all plan tasks checked' (line 720) is now factually true. The only remaining `- [ ]` is task 9.3 (this re-review itself), which is correctly in-progress — not a tracking gap. Revision log entry 1.2 records the change.
